query_params.name: start
query_params.description: The location where the list of results starts from. You can use this to indicate the starting index for pagination of results.

query_params.name: limit
query_params.description: The number of tags you want displayed per page.

query_params.name: property
query_params.description: The attribute you want to filter by when retrieving tags. Supported values include `name`, `archived`, and `tagCategoryId`.

query_params.name: sortBy
query_params.description: The attribute that is used to determine the sort order for the tags. Supported values include `name`, `createdAt`, and `modifiedAt`.

query_params.name: sortOrder
query_params.description: The direction in which the tags are sorted by. Supported values include `asc` and `desc`.

answer_constraints: Use only verified SQL/API outputs as evidence.
Do not invent IDs, timestamps, counts, statuses, or names.
If SQL and API disagree, mention the discrepancy clearly.
For list questions, return concise rows/items with relevant identifiers.
If API returns an error or empty result, state that clearly.
